user_story: I follow @papanda on Zora and want to support them by buying their 'zora' trend coin directly with ZORA tokens I already hold. Single-hop V4 swap, no multi-hop needed.

turns.prompt: Look up the Zora creator @papanda and show me their 'zora' trend coin (address 0x2748009c2c5d46b78a3a7bdfd5b121edfb72f519). I want to know the pool currency, holder count, and current price in ZORA.

Good. I hold 200 ZORA in my wallet. Buy 50 ZORA worth of papanda's 'zora' trend coin with 5% slippage. The coin is ZORA-backed, so it's a single-hop V4 swap. Activate the zora skill, check Permit2 allowances on ZORA, and simulate the swap.
